programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Back In The Hunt
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, head for open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Numbers War
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester battle for prime fishing spots in their quest to catch the elusive and lucrative Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight
programme.desc: For the tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, it's tournament time, and, with a big cash prize up for grabs, the fight is on to catch the biggest bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sweet Smell of Revenge
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle droves of bumbling amateur fishermen in their bid to catch lucrative Atlantic Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning
programme.desc: A storm is racing towards the north Atlantic fishing grounds, but with time ticking away on the bluefin tuna season, the captains have no choice but to head out to fish in the rough weather.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case
programme.desc: On September 12, 2013, Eric Mosser, a 45-year-old heating engineer, discovers his wife Isabelle lying in a pool of blood at their home in Illfurth, Alsace.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.
programme.sub-title: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?
programme.sub-title: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case
programme.desc: On April 18th 2014, in Visé, Belgium, policemen are informed that gunshots had been fired on the street.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle
programme.desc: On March 19th 1998, Akira Ojima, a 57 years old japanese architect, is found dead in the fridge of a villa in Nanterre.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Fighting for the Truth
programme.desc: An employee is found dead in a restaurant kitchen. Clues found near the body include an empty cash register, a knife, and a trail of blood splotches leading to a vandalized car in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: One False Move
programme.desc: All circumstances point to foul play in the case of a dead hunter and the police fear that a killer is on the loose. Dr. G must provide them with answers before there are more victims.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: In The Dead of The Night
programme.desc: A 71-year-old man wakes in the middle of the night, gasping for air. Paramedics rush to save him, but it’s all in vain: he’s dead by the time they arrive. What caused his death?
programme.sub-title: In The Dead of The Night

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Clue Game
programme.desc: Rebecca Davis is found dead in her bed after she fails to show up for work. Dr. G must race against the clock to find out what took this young woman’s life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Lovers Quarrel
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a man died as a result of his infected stab wound or if his history of drug abuse was the culprit.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Storms
programme.desc: It’s up to Dr. G to determine if alcohol was to blame for a man's death or if there was a silent killer lurking in his body.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Paths of Destruction
programme.desc: It’s a late night and a Vietnam veteran with a history of mental illness is drunk and stumbling through an apartment complex. When the police arrive, he pulls a gun and shoots himself in the head.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Dark Waters
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Mark Hatton – aka Alex de Rothschild – The Bogus Banker
programme.desc: Posing as a member of the Rothschild banking dynasty, he duped a string of women in the UK and US.
programme.sub-title: Mark Hatton – aka Alex de Rothschild – The Bogus Banker

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Gene Morrison – Fraudulent Forensics Expert
programme.desc: He faked his own credentials and netted $400,000 of taxpayers money, giving bogus court testimony and investigative services.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist
programme.desc: Dubbed the British Frank Abagnale, Bint committed more than 500 offences including impersonating people.
programme.sub-title: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: John Myatt and John Drew – The Art World Con
programme.desc: The pair pulled off the biggest art con of the 20th Century, passing off works painted by Myatt as genuine works by famous artists.
programme.sub-title: John Myatt and John Drew – The Art World Con

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Candy Man
programme.desc: On August 8, 1973, police in Pasadena, Texas received a phone call from a young man who had just committed murder.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Conservative Killer
programme.desc: In 1983 the ex-wife of Cabinet Minister Colin Thatcher is found brutally murdered in her garage.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.
programme.sub-title: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slave Master
programme.desc: Several women went missing from the Kansas City area in the 1980s and 1990s.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder: Sex, Lies, And Murder
programme.desc: When a wholesome family woman is gunned down outside her church after choir practice, police uncover a network of corruption and illicit sex lie just below a flawless surface.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder: Killer Grandma
programme.desc: A condominium manager finds a body left in one of her suites. But when an investigation begins, the police discover this isn't the first victim.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder: Misery In Missouri
programme.desc: After a Midwestern insurance salesman is discovered on the floor of his office with an extra hole in his head, his wife, family, community, and church are drawn into a web of greed, infidelity, and murder.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Betrayal of Trust
programme.desc: Keri Reynolds’ job as a caregiver puts her into a near-fatal encounter with her own patient. Meanwhile, in California, a single mom battling an eating disorder looks to a personal trainer for help, but all he sees is someone to prey on.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: A Texas schoolteacher is abducted in the middle of the night by a gun-toting stranger with a sinister plan. Meanwhile, an Ottawa woman’s casual dating experience proves anything but when her former lover shows up with a gun and a deadly promise.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Coke-crazed Killer
programme.desc: After murdering his wife, Raoul Garza is on a cocaine-fuelled rampage in a small Texas border town. And he finds his next victim just down the street - a hardworking single mother determined to save her kids even if it means sacrificing her own life.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Dylan McDermott
programme.desc: Dylan McDermott seeks the truth 40 years after the in the 1967 death of his 20-year-old mother.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Woody Harrelson
programme.desc: Woody Harrelson's portrayal of a serial killer may have been influenced by his father.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Bonny Lee Bakley is shot to death outside a neighborhood Italian restaurant in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Human Hunter
programme.desc: Robert C. Hansen was known for his hunting abilities. In the early 1980s, however, his taste for hunting took a sinister turn.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Rockhampton Rapist
programme.desc: In the late 1990s, a string of disappearances in Rockhampton, Queensland left police searching for a killer they couldn't identify.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: New doc Jake's first patient has fallen down the stairs.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 3
programme.desc: Two builders are rushed to casualty after a roof collapse.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: 84-year-old Terry comes in with a badly-broken ankle and fears he may never dance again.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 5
programme.desc: The hospital is two porters down, marking a big problem for Sister Jane.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: A man is treated after being involved in a serious motobike accident.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 7
programme.desc: A toddler is brought in with sepsis and 84-year-old Norman has had a fall.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 8
programme.desc: The staff and patients of Barnsley's A&E department are put under the microscope.

programme.title: A&E After Dark: Episode 1
programme.desc: A patient with a police escort gives Dr Pon short shrift.

programme.title: A&E After Dark: Episode 2
programme.desc: A homeless man has his injured hand attended to.

programme.title: A&E After Dark: Episode 3
programme.desc: An accident and emergency department treats a severe wound on a man after he fell.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 9
programme.desc: Nurse Practitioner Dave tries to get to the bottom of why June's tongue has turned black!

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 1
programme.desc: Patrick examines a man who has had a suspected heart attack.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: A two-year-old girl is dealing with low blood sugar levels.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 3
programme.desc: Internal wounds and a collapsed lung.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: Treatment for a broken leg and a neurological disease.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 7
programme.desc: In Barnsley's Casualty department, it's a battle of life and death every single day.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 8
programme.desc: Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date with beds becoming limited.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 9
programme.desc: A woman has a life-threatening allergic reaction to nuts. A man has an arm injury.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: Professional scuba diver Brian Green has been found floating and not breathing, and is on a boat near the Noises, a group of islands in the Hauraki Gulf. The team has to move fast.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3
programme.desc: On Great Mercury Island near Coromandel, a scuba diver has surfaced unconscious without a pulse. Without Rescue 1 he may soon be dead.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team respond to a call out where an elderly couple in their 60s are in a critical condition after a head on collision.

programme.title: Scorpion: Super Fun Guys
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on the "Super Fun Guy" movie set in Kazakstan in order to disable a Soviet-era nuclear missile being sold by terrorists.

programme.title: Scorpion: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll
programme.desc: Walter's attempt to "normalize" goes horribly wrong when a nefarious virus is uploaded to his computer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop a sabotaged runaway subway train with Paige and Ralph on board. Also, in his attempt to impress Happy, Toby has his first boxing match.

programme.title: Scorpion: Area 51
programme.desc: To help fund Walter's research into saving his sister's life, Team Scorpion takes a lucrative job for the CIA to find a top-secret aircraft in the mysterious Area 51.

programme.title: Scorpion: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Arrivals And Departures
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover at a university to find a hacker who infiltrates the Federal Reserve and threatens to collapse the world economy.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rains create a large crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out an entire town in its wake.

programme.title: Scorpion: White Out
programme.desc: In order to save a United States Special Forces unit from certain death, Team Scorpion must brave the subzero temperatures of Antarctica.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father who asks Team Scorpion for help.

programme.title: Scorpion: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is helping with NASA's top secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fractured
programme.desc: After a powerful earthquake rocks Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must fix a pinched gas line to prevent a massive explosion.

programme.title: Scorpion: Adaptation
programme.desc: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Scorpion: Toby Or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must out-think their unstable ex-Scorpion member after he kidnaps Toby and threatens to kill him unless his cunning demands are met.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 1
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 2
programme.desc: Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough. Wheeljack takes Sideswipe hostage, but Hot Shot rescues him. On the moon, Megatron welcomes Wheeljack to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Regeneration
programme.desc: Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre. To prove he's genuine, he gives the Autobots details of the moon base. Red Alert works on what's left of Smokescreen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rescue
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crisis
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed. Optimus makes the ultimate sacrifice and takes the full blast. Afterwards only his minicon and his matrix are found, but at least earth survives.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Remorse
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Depart
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot, supported by the rest of the team, refuse to let the children accompany them. But then the minicons refuse to allow the ship to depart unless the kids are on board.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Miracle
programme.desc: As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Puppet
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole. The minicons guide the Axalon to their location, where they are all attacked by Nemesis Prime. As the planet breaks up, the 'Cons shoot down the Axalon and escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Drift
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream, who saves the children from being killed. The children discover the origins of the minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Portent
programme.desc: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal deep underground: his pursuers follow and find themselves on Cybertron's moon, which begins to disintegrate. To everyone's horror, Unicron is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Cramp
programme.desc: To convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus to prevent Unicron taking over the universe, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Origin
programme.desc: With the minicons protecting Cybertron and Hot Shot's team attacking Unicron from outside, and Optimus and Galvatron facing Sideways at Unicron's heart, the purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mortal Combat
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fallen
programme.desc: When Cybertron is threatened by a colossal black hole, Optimus Prime and the Autobots give the order to evacuate the planet. However, a mysterious stranger holds one last hope…

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Haven
programme.desc: With the help of their human friends, the Autobots construct a new HQ on Earth, but will Megatron discover their secret base before it's finished?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hidden
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to blend in by assuming alternate transformation modes suitable for Earth. Meanwhile, the Decepticons engage human military forces, and the Autobots are forced to intervene.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Landmine
programme.desc: Landmine tries to adjust to life on Earth while recovering from the injury Starscream's null cannons inflicted on him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Space
programme.desc: Bud is taken into space so he can see what the Earth is really like, but trouble occurs when he and Scattershot must be saved while the others are fighting against Thundercracker and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Rush
programme.desc: Hotshot and Megatron race against Override in an attempt to win the first cyber planet key. Will either win when Crumplezone and Ransack are interfering?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Speed
programme.desc: Starscream plots how he can defend his title as Megatron's right-hand man while Thundercracker lures the Autobots into a trap. Meanwhile, Hot Shot tries another attempt to beat Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Collapse
programme.desc: Megatron searches for the Cyber Planet Key with extreme force, while the Autobots try to stop the massive earthquakes that are threatening the city.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Time
programme.desc: Red Alert becomes concerned at the desperate measures Hot Shot is taking to beat Override, while Vector Prime and the kids travel to the Sahara in search of the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Search
programme.desc: The Autobots join Vector Prime to search for the Omega Lock, while Overhaul is left stranded by a surprise attack by Megatron and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Deep
programme.desc: Overhaul and Megatron try to convince inhabitants of the Jungle Planet of their 'good' intentions, while the Autobots investigate the appearance of a new Atlantean symbol.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ship
programme.desc: After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hero
programme.desc: Optimus discovers that Hot Shot has disobeyed his orders while Red Alert has covered for him. However, he is forced to put his trust into Hot Shot to win the Cyber Key from Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Race
programme.desc: Hot Shot and the Autobots battle Ransack and Crumplezone in the first round, while Starscream continues to build his forces when he recruits Mudflap and Lori and Bud uncover information on the Ancients' prehistoric visit to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Detour
programme.desc: As the race for the Speed Planet Cup continues, Hot Shot teaches Override the Autobots' code of honor, while Overhaul faces Scourge on the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Advances in forensic science shine a light on a case that went cold for decades, revealing the name of a serial killer who murdered two women in the late 80s in Orange County, California.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two of America's premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill, investigators immediately view the hundreds of prisoners as suspects.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a nine year old girl headed for school vanishes from her quiet suburban neighborhood, an entire community starts searching for her abductor. Investigators wonder if her long-lost mother might be connected to the disappearance.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a state trooper is attacked, investigators uncover a `signature' that links the assault to the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman vanishes under mysterious circumstances, investigators use cat hairs and insects to track her down.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Blood spatter analysis and an investigation lead police to the truth when a pregnant woman is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother is determined to discover what happened when her daughter is injured in a hit and run accident.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother and daughter vanish whilst out shopping. When the girl turns up dead, the mother is the initial suspect, but who really killed her?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Walter Notheis Jr was the lead singer of Bob Kuban And The In Men, who had hits in the 60's. He disappeared in 1983 and was found dead in 1987. How did he meet his maker?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman at a pizza restaurant, police thought the case was closed. Until eight years later when another man confessed.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When two boys were attacked on a fishing trip, the police suspected locals thugs, but couldn't find enough evidence. Could the murky waters of the fishing hole provide proof?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The investigation into the disappearance of Helle Crafts led to the murder conviction of her husband.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators use blood evidence to convict a man of murdering his wife.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Scientists and detectives use DNA to solve a string of rapes and murders.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police in Arizona ask a molecular geneticist to pick out a tree in a `lineup' when unidentified seed pods are found in a suspect's truck. The judge rules into evidence DNA profiles linking the pods to a tree near where the body was found.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police thought they had a serial rapist and murderer, but DNA testing and research led to another arrest and conviction.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An Alabama woman discovers her husband brutally murdered in their home, but differing interpretations of the physical evidence muddle the legal case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1987, a man finds his wife brutally murdered on the kitchen floor.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Insects are sometimes used to determine the time of a person's death when traditional techniques fail.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Art and science combine in this episode as an artist and sculptor works with a forensic psychologist to develop a profile of an ageing murderer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Autopsies reveal that a string of unexplained deaths in Omaha resulted from poison-induced liver disintegration.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a human skull is unearthed at a Boy Scout camp, investigators use facial reconstruction to identify the victim and her killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The 1984 rape of a young Virginia woman is revisited by the experts when DNA testing refutes her ID of the rapist and calls everything into question.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two years after a girl was murdered, a tiny drop of blood and burnt bones lead police to her murderers.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother claims that an intruder murdered her two sons, but lacking a motive, police use blood-spatter analysis and behavioural profiling to reconstruct a different scenario.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2001, a seven-year-old girl was abducted on her way to school in Greeley, Colorado, by a stranger who sexually abused her and then released her. Despite all efforts, the perpetrator could not be found for almost 20 years.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young prostitute is found dead in an Ohio waterway. Authorities have one tiny clue which could point to her killer, but face huge challenges due to her policemen clients and DNA evidence being washed away.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1990, a woman in Rankin County, Mississippi, was kidnapped and raped at knifepoint, but the case went cold for decades until a DNA match from an unrelated crime identified the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1972, a young woman was discovered covered in blood by the road in Snohomish County, in the US state of Washington, and passed away a short time after being taken to hospital.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In a small South Carolina town in 1991, 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd, a popular high school student, was raped, murdered and dumped in a deserted field. With few leads, authorities DNA tested several friends and the match was a shock to all.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman vanished from her home on Prince Edward Island. Her abandoned car was found in a field; inside, the windows were spattered with blood. During the search for her body, police found a plastic bag containing a sneakers and a leather jacket.

programme.title: Futebol Arte
programme.desc: Brazil squad at the 1982 FIFA World Cup will forever be remembered as one of the most exciting teams.

programme.title: FACTS
programme.desc: Italy vs Zidane's France drama explained.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Recap
programme.desc: This week, we sit down with Bryan Golie, Jeff Darrah, Joe Kambic, and John Lasofsky as they recount what they've been through in their careers as well as what happened this past season.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation H2O
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Antler Raiders
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens try to control the masses as the gates open and antler hunters are set free to find their trophies.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Warm Springs
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Across The Seeded Fields
programme.desc: Montana game wardens work the opening day of pronghorn season as they monitor legal and illegal hunting practices, as well as protecting the seeded fields from undue harm.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Bitterroot
programme.desc: Opening day of big game season is busy for Montana's Game Wardens. Follow along as they patrol the Bitterroot game area. Plus, the wardens set up a sting to catch poachers, complete with a moving decoy.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Moonshine
programme.desc: Montana game wardens attempt to track down suspects of illegally killed animals. Plus, one wardens get the opportunity to take a break from enforcing hunting laws to actually go on a mule deer hunt for himself.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Big Horn
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered where confiscated trophy animals end up? Today we'll show you. Follow game wardens as they monitor hunting activity on big horn sheep. Flathead Lake is overflowing with holiday cheer during the 4th of July. Let's keep it safe.

programme.title: Vinne Jones USA Toughest Cops: Baltimore
programme.desc: Vinnie Jones joins the Baltimore Police Department on their mission to take guns off the streets and lower the homicide rate in America's murder capital.

programme.title: Vinnie Jones Toughest Cops: Kosovo
programme.desc: Kosovo is one of the smallest regions in the Balkans. We join the Regional Support Operations Unit, ROSU, as they police a political demonstration in a part of the world where ethnic tension runs high.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Prague
programme.desc: The city of Prague sees hordes of British stag party goers filing through its numerous nightclubs and sex clubs every year, all on a mission to have a great time in the heart of this famously liberal city.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Mexico
programme.desc: Mexico City is one of the largest metropolises in the world, buts it is also the Kidnapping Capital of the world MacIntyre finds himself thrown head first into a city where life is cheap and the criminals operate with impunity.

programme.title: Danny Dyer's Deadliest Men: Spud
programme.desc: Danny Dyer gets a unique taste of what it’s like to be a soldier as he goes on a journey to get inside the mind of ex SAS soldier – Spud.

programme.title: Danny Dyer's Deadliest Men: Bradley Welsh
programme.desc: Danny Dyer returns to familiar ground when he meets former football hooligan, Bradley Welsh. Part of Edinburgh's football gangs in the 80s he was always at the forefront of all the mayhem

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: The Americans
programme.desc: The Americans are a gang that rule fear across the Cape Flats. We join filmmaker Laurens Barnard who has dedicated his time to filming these ruthless criminals and talk to him about his experiences filming the murder of a well known American gangsters

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Salford
programme.desc: The Hacienda is still a name that is renowned for being the pioneer in the UK House scene. It was also remembered for clubbing culture that was destroyed by gang activities.

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: Andrew Cunanan: Versace's Assassin
programme.desc: Versace's life was marked by high fashion and beautiful women until he was shot dead outside of his home.

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: Richard Sharpe: A Harvard Killing
programme.desc: The story of a Harvard grad who killed his wife when she learned he was moonlighting as a cross-dresser.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Rogers Pass
programme.desc: Montana Game Warden Bryan Golie helps out when a hunter is injured while in the woods. Elsewhere, Wardens chase down hunters that don't stop at their check station; with surprising results.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Elk Dummy
programme.desc: Montana game wardens deploy elk decoys across the state in hopes of catching would-be poachers.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with a missing child who was last seen dragged off by a bear... good thing it's only a training excercise. Meanwhile it's opening season for shed antler hunters and the wardens have their hands full!

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Water Rescue
programme.desc: This week, a couple of wardens face off with early season anglers over gaming laws while other wardens get trained in open water rescue techniques.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: A meteorologist sets out to derail the top secret weather-manipulating program he mistakenly became a part of.

programme.title: Ice Part I
programme.desc: The destructive effects of global warming cause unimaginable devastation and panic worldwide in this post-apocalyptic disaster film starring A-list cast- Richard Roxburgh (Hacksaw Ridge) and Sam Neil (Jurassic Park).

programme.title: Ice Part II
programme.desc: The destructive effects of global warming cause unimaginable devastation and panic worldwide in this post-apocalyptic disaster film starring A-list cast- Richard Roxburgh (Hacksaw Ridge) and Sam Neil (Jurassic Park).

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist and a miner must stop a massive earthquake that threatens to tear the world in half.

programme.title: Apocalypse Pompeii
programme.desc: When a Former Special Ops commando visits Pompeii, his family is trapped as Mt. Vesuvius erupts with massive force. While his family fights to survive, he enlists his former teammates in a daring operation beneath the ruins of Pompeii.

programme.title: Super Cyclone
programme.desc: When a super cyclone threatens the entire American eastern seaboard, a lone meteorologist and a petroleum engineer must battle the elements to stop the threat.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: 2012: Ice Age
programme.desc: When a volcanic eruption in Iceland sends a glacier hurtling toward North America, a family struggles to escape the onslaught of the coming ice age.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Meteor Apocalypse
programme.desc: In this End Times thriller, a gigantic meteor enters Earth's orbit and begins to disintegrate, showering the planet in poisonous debris.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Andy McNally’s first shift on the job turns into mayhem when shots are fired in a downtown rooming house. In the midst of the chaos, Andy triumphantly makes her first big arrest

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fite Nite
programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy’s undercover skills are tested –and found to be lacking –during a citywidecampaign to clean up the streets, whenshe’s tapped to pose as a prostitute in order to arrest unsuspecting johns.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A home invasion at an upscale address leads to a massive first response call that brings out the training officers in full force. After the scene is cleared, Andy and Traci remain behind with the terrified homeowner.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: A dramatization of the disaster in April 2010, when the offshore drilling rig called the Deepwater Horizon exploded, resulting in the worst oil spill in American history.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings, police Sgt. Tommy Saunders, FBI Special Agent Richard DesLauriers and Commissioner Ed Davis join survivors, first responders and other investigators in a race against time to find the suspects.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: In the dark about each other's true identity, two undercover agents (Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg) from competing bureaus go on the run together after an attempt to infiltrate a drug cartel goes haywire.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: Having earned a shot at a world championship, boxer Micky Ward (Mark Wahlberg) reunites with his estranged brother (Christian Bale) to train for the fight and become the new "Pride of Lowell."

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: A dramatization of the disaster in April 2010, when the offshore drilling rig called the Deepwater Horizon exploded, resulting in the worst oil spill in American history.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings, police Sgt. Tommy Saunders, FBI Special Agent Richard DesLauriers and Commissioner Ed Davis join survivors, first responders and other investigators in a race against time to find the suspects.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: In the dark about each other's true identity, two undercover agents (Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg) from competing bureaus go on the run together after an attempt to infiltrate a drug cartel goes haywire.

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: A college student (Tom Hanks) begins to live the role he plays with three friends in a medieval fantasy game.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: After six years in a coma following a near-fatal car accident, Johnny Smith awakens to find he has the gift of second sight and uses his psychic powers to help solve a serial murder case.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: What It Seems
programme.desc: Johnny uses his psychic powers to help solve a serial murder case.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Quality of Life
programme.desc: Johnny Smith gains trust in his powers after they enable him to save a star high school athlete from a life-threatening heart condition.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Enigma
programme.desc: In helping an old man find his long lost love, Johnny Smith falls in love with the woman himself through visions he has of her in her youth.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Unreasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Johnny Smith is called to serve on a jury and uses his powers to uncover the real facts in the case.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The House
programme.desc: Johnny Smith experiences disturbing visions in his home that lead him to discover the truth about his mother's death.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Enemy Mind
programme.desc: While trying to rescue a runaway teen, Johnny Smith is exposed to mind-altering drugs that have a uniquely adverse effect on his brain.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Netherworld
programme.desc: Struck with a vision of a fiery explosion, Johnny Smith must distinguish between his dream world and reality in order to prevent a disaster.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Siege
programme.desc: Johnny Smith attempts to manipulate the events during a hostage situation in a bank but each time he makes a move, the ending changes for the worse.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: UFO Hunters II: Tales from the universe
programme.desc: Italian ufologists explore alien evidence in history & folklore. Have we been watched since ancient times?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: The UFO Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 1942 LA: A mysterious UFO causes blackout & artillery fire. Remains unexplained.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins
programme.desc: A family fights off goblin-aliens in a mysterious encounter, sparking debates and investigations. Fear drives their actions.

programme.title: The Hidden Hand Alien Contact and the Government Cover Up
programme.desc: The Hidden Hand is a controversial EBE Award winning documentary that explores the possibility of an extraterrestrial presence here on Earth.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins
programme.desc: Researchers discover that aliens from another world assisted in the evolution of man and were the genesis of a very real bloodline that remains intact today.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: 30 Insane UFO Encounters
programme.desc: A review of the 30 most insane UFO encounters for your eyes delight and its up to you to make your own mind up, if these amazing encounters could be the real deal or one big elaborate hoax

programme.title: Aliens In USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.desc: Glamour model Bex wants to put her Jedward tattoo behind her, and Andy has an inspirational tattoo story. Annie hopes to fix a tattoo that, after a mid-inking disagreement, didn't turn out as planned.

programme.desc: When Gabby is uprooted during senior year, she finds herself split between two boys while having one last shot to make her dance dreams come true.

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.desc: Get ready for some sizzling cinema with Pluto TV Hot Summer Nights. Escape the heat and enjoy our selection of cheeky movies that are sure to keep you entertained. Grab some popcorn and settle in for a scorching cinema experience!

programme.title: Great American Sex Scandal
programme.desc: A shy accountant is charged with embezzlement, but an overtly sexual testimony by a secretary paints him in a different light. Jurors are trapped when a trial suddenly turns into a tabloid field day. Starring: Mädchen Amick, Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: Emmanuelle In Soho
programme.desc: Sultry Emmanuelle is determined to do whatever it takes to be the sensation of Soho's strip clubs - even if it means signing up with London's sleaziest agent! Red hot and blue!

programme.title: Hannah Has a Ho Phase
programme.desc: When Leslie, a brazen pole-dance instructor, gets fed up with her prudish roommate, Hannah, she challenges her to the bet of a lifetime: Hannah must sleep with ten guys while Leslie does the unthinkable and "re-virginizes".

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Winnie, Darcy og Nan, dansere på det siste i dime-a-dance-festen, faller hver for seg for den nye bandlederen Michaels sjarm mens han fyller et spesielt tomrom i livene deres.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Harry og Cecelia, på flukt i en stjålet bil, plukker opp en haikende jomfrubrud som truer med selvmord hvis hun ikke blir elsket umiddelbart, men hun skal arve en formue hvis hun er jomfru når hun gifter seg. Harry gifter seg med Precious.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: En gift kvinne har en lidenskapelig affære med tennislæreren sin, bare for å finne ut at mannen hennes ansatte ham for å låse opp hemningene hennes gjennom øm kjærlig instruksjon for å hjelpe deres avkjølende forhold.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: En kvinne flykter til en gård på landet for å tenke nytt om det smuldrende forholdet sitt. Når en storm slår ut all kommunikasjon bortsett fra brevdue, kommuniserer snart hun og kjæresten hennes som aldri før og tenner opp igjen flammen i forholdet deres.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Alice liker ideen om å bli en dominatrix, så hun tar en klasse. Under treningen møter hun Giuseppe og blir forelsket, men når hun avslører sin sanne identitet er han sint til han innser at han også er forelsket.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Når Tess tar en jobb som resepsjonist, oppdager hun at selskapet faktisk er en kjærlighetstelefon. Til å begynne med er hun usikker på at hun raskt nyter fantasiene og bringer dem hjem til mannen sin, og bringer lidenskapen tilbake...

programme.title: Lez Bomb
programme.desc: Lez Bomb is a hilarious and sweet “coming out” comedy in the vein of Meet the Parents from Bobby Farrelly, producer of There’s Something about Mary. Lauren, (Writer-Director Jenna Laurenzo) comes home with life changing news.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Forgotten relics from the defence of America's homeland, concealed by the banks of the Mississippi, and a concrete behemoth on the French coast that proved invulnerable.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An American prison for the violent and deranged with links to an infamous cult leader, and a cavernous tunnel network in France offering shelter from unrelenting bombardment.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Kelsey Berreth vanishes on Thanksgiving in 2018, blood in her house and cell phone records indicate that there is more to Kelsey's disappearance than meets the eye.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 28th February 2001, the body of a woman was found at the bottom of the stairs of her home in North Dublin, Ireland. What initially looked like an accident, soon turned into a murder investigation.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In January 1992, when an estate agent went missing, both police and her family feared the worst. For 25-year-old Stephanie Slater, it was the start of an 8 day ordeal defined by torture and terror.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 17th September 2006, emergency services were called to a blaze in Pinyon Pines. A house was engulfed in flames and three burned bodies were discovered inside. It soon became clear this was no accident.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Fridge Killer follows the investigation into a truly spine-chilling murder in Nevada, that led police to uncover a serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The 36 year investigation into Virginia Freeman's murder and the forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Covering the 38-year investigation into Jeannie Moore's murder.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the brutal and senseless murder of Sandra Rozzo. Attempting to understand how and why she died, and how determined police work and forensic science eventually crack the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Attacking in broad daylight, the `M25 Rapist' became synonymous with fear and triggered one of the biggest manhunts in British history. All the police had to go on was a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The terrifying assault of Ronda Guzman and the investigation that reveals her attacker after 33 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of Shelby Weatherly, and how the police caught her killer.

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: The Mexican Staring Frog Of Southern Sri Lanka: After being duped by Stan's Uncle Jimbo, the boys decide to take revenge by making bogus videos of a certain frog. Will Jesus stand for this? (S2, E06)
programme.sub-title: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)
programme.sub-title: City on the Edge of Forever

programme.title: South Park: Summer Sucks
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Chickenpox
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off the Fatty Foods
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)
programme.sub-title: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off the Fatty Foods

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Spooky Fish
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park: Merry Christmas Charlie Manson
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Spontaneous Combustion
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Succubus
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Tweek Vs. Craig
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Jakovasaurs
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter than Summer: The Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)
programme.sub-title: Hotter than Summer: The Sexual Harassment Panda
