programme.title: Property Brothers: Kate & Cole
programme.desc: Forced to live and work out of a cramped rental with their beloved dogs and cat, Kate and Cole decide it's finally time to buy their first house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Steph & Micah
programme.desc: Happily married for three years, Steph and Micah are ready to buy their first house but can't find anything that meets their needs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Lana & Jacob
programme.desc: Tripping over themselves in their tiny one bedroom apartment, Lana and Jacob are ready to buy their first house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Amber
programme.desc: Fresh out of a six-year relationship, Amber is determined to move on and buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help her find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Jessica & Rob
programme.desc: Forced to live with their in-laws, Jessica, Rob, and their fiercely independent 5-year old daughter, Coco, are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Olivia
programme.desc: Wildly social and tired of being crammed in a tiny apartment, Olivia is desperate to buy a new house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sophie & Preston
programme.desc: Tired of renting and in need of more space for their fabulous parties, Sophie, Preston, and their five-year-old son Finn, are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Cori & Suroosh
programme.desc: With two young boys and a huge extended family that loves to socialize, Cori and Suroosh are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Jeanette & Tony
programme.desc: In between places and forced to crash with friends, Jeanette and Tony are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kristi & Jay
programme.desc: Paralyzed by indecision and tired of renting, Kristi and Jay are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Luke & Courtney
programme.desc: Cramped in a tiny condo with newborn twins and a two-year-old daughter, Luke and Courtney are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: April
programme.desc: Working long hours and eager to upgrade her starter home, April is looking to buy a house in the downtown core. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help her find a budget-friendly dream home to be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kristine & Paul
programme.desc: Stuck in a tiny apartment with their rambunctious young son, Evan, Kristine and Paul are desperate to buy a spacious home. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the couple find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sarah & Mari
programme.desc: Crammed in close quarters with her sister's family, Sarah and partner Mari desperately need their own house to raise their baby daughter. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly home

programme.title: Property Brothers: Samira & Shawn
programme.desc: Busy professionals Samira and Shawn are living out of a suitcase as they hunt for the perfect house-ideally a luxury pad close to Shawn's office. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Angie & Tito
programme.desc: Angie and Tito live in a cramped apartment full of their kid's toys. They want a large, modern house they can grow into, close to downtown, with a gourmet kitchen and lots of closets. The Property Brothers come to help.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Matt & Krysten
programme.desc: Matt and Krysten are trading in their condo for a large modern house where they can put down roots. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: James & David
programme.desc: James and David are desperate to escape their nightmare townhouse, the one with mountainous stairs beside a stinky sewage treatment plant. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Parker & Francesca
programme.desc: Parker and Francesca live on top of each other in a tiny condo overlooking a concrete jungle. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: As Deborah Utley begins experiencing paranormal events in her home, she turns to her faith for protection. But when her children are targeted by the entity she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: A Haunting: Portal Of Doom
programme.desc: Anita Intenzo and her son, Chris, encounter the ghost of their recently deceased friend Paul while preparing his house to be sold. Paul warns of a demon attached to an artifact he acquired abroad. The demon invades Anita’s home and all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: A Haunting: Field Of Ghosts
programme.desc: For as long as she can remember, Markie Beason has sensed something horrible happened in her home and becomes frightened to be alone in the house. Her father David, reaches out to a paranormal investigation group in hopes they can bring peace to the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Meriden, Connecticut natives Lynn and Jason Ryder purchase a historic restaurant, thinking it will be an adventure to operate an establishment so much a part of their youth. Little do they know their experience is about to turn into their worst nightmare.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes of the Past
programme.desc: The Johnson’s young daughter reveals that two fairies visit her room each night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Blood Visions
programme.desc: Faced with a supernatural threat, Betty Johnson and her family move hoping to leave their troubles behind. But when Betty’s oldest child starts experiencing bloody visions and is physically attacked, the family realizes "it" has followed them.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare Upstairs
programme.desc: The VanLandingham family moves to a larger house in the small town of Wynne, Arkansas. What they first consider "house-settling" noise and behavior quickly turns into a full-scale supernatural physical attack on both daughters Brianna and Heather.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.desc: Examining the chilling case of Sean Gillis who stalked, raped and brutally murdered eight women.

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.desc: Exploring the chilling case of killer cousins David Gore and Fred Waterfield.

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Detectives, attorneys and psychiatrists try to profile Kenneth Bianchi and Angelo Buono.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1984, Wesley Shermantine and Loren Herzog embarked upon a drug-fuelled killing spree that would span 15 years, dumping their victims in the remote rural Californian countryside and down old pioneer wells where they had spent their childhood.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The trial of Timothy Wilson-Spencer, who strangled five people in the 1980s, was historic as it was the first case solved with DNA evidence.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Was the heinous serial killer Herbert William Mullin driven by nature or nurture? Featuring a unique interview with the murderer himself.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Exploring the chilling case of killer cousins David Gore and Fred Waterfield.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and experts in the field seek clues as to what prompted the awful crimes carried out by Beverley Allitt.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The detectives, attorneys and psychiatrists who tried to unravel the mystery of why so many young people fell under Manson's spell, and how he was able to convince them to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the vicious crimes of Charles Starkweather, an American spree killer who murdered 11 people in the late 50s during a deadly road trip with his young lover.

programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the vicious crimes of Charles Starkweather, an American spree killer who murdered 11 people in the late 50s during a deadly road trip with his young lover.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Manchester murderer, Trevor Hardy, took the lives of three teenage girls in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Known as `the meanest man in America', Donald Henry Gaskins brutally tortured and killed over 100 people. And, even on Death Row, he managed to commit one final murder.

programme.title: Alf's Button Afloat
programme.desc: Alf goes to sea with a group of crew members when he discovers that one of the buttons on his uniform is made from the metal of Aladdin's lamp, and when he cleans it, a genie appears.

programme.title: Laughter in Paradise
programme.desc: When a playful millionaire dies, he leaves a surprise for his loved ones. However, in order to claim his fortune, they must complete assignments that will help them become better people.

programme.title: Make Mine Mink
programme.desc: An Englishwoman recruits a retired major, a spinster and a teacher to steal furs for charity.

programme.title: Don't Bother to Knock
programme.desc: A flirtatious travel agent gives all his girlfriends keys to his flat, which seemingly backfires.

programme.title: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Benjamin Stubbins, a penniless lawyer, has spent most of his money on liquor. When he interrupts a robbery at work, he is targeted by a gang of thieves who determine that, his relatives, are richer than he is.

programme.title: The Happiest Days of Your Life
programme.desc: A girls' school is evacuated to the country, but due to a bureaucratic error they find themselves billeted with a boys' school. While the boys and girls soon hit it off, the headmaster clashes with the headmistress and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Home at Seven
programme.desc: David Preston, a bank official goes missing for 24 hours and has no memory of the lost time.

programme.title: Simon and Laura
programme.desc: Married British co-stars of a home-life series finally show their home life as it really is, on live TV.

programme.title: It's Great to Be Young
programme.desc: Grammar school co-eds fight the establishment after their teacher is fired for buying instruments for the students.

programme.title: Catch Us if You Can
programme.desc: Dinah is a model whose face appears in an ad campaign for meat. While shooting a TV commercial, she and Steve, one of the stunt men, run off together. The advertising executives use their disappearance to generate more publicity for meat.

programme.title: Three Hats for Lisa
programme.desc: Set in London in the 1960s, following a group of girls who skip work for the day to try and meet a stylish Italian movie star at Heathrow airport.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Where Did My Man Learn New Sex Moves?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?

programme.sub-title: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 3 Mad Moms... 4 Babies... Is Aaron the Dad?

programme.title: NEW Karamo

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Today on Karamo, Brandon believes that his girlfriend, Regina, has been inviting random men to their home while he's at work. Next, Darnesha is fed up battling her daughter Monique regarding parenting, respect, and attitude.
programme.sub-title: Double Unlock: To Reveal The Truth / Mom, Your Abusive Exes Ruined My Life

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: John and Shay share their struggles with having a blended family. Barbara does the best she can in raising her 16-year-old niece, Ayonna, who is making bad choices.
programme.sub-title: My Niece Is 16 and Pregnant ... I Need Help

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Cori discusses her battle with lupus, the vitriol spewed on social media and adversity she's encountered; Brandon says his mother, Quada, is controlling and constantly derides him.
programme.sub-title: Rapper’s Daughter Talks about Internet Trolls / My Mom Says She Hates Me

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Tameeka met her boyfriend online and is ready to take the next step in their relationship. But her friends and family are trying to put the kibosh on things. Why? Her family members, Jenna and Angela, believe that Tameeka is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Brittany insists that Sharif is the father to her daughter. His refusal to step up and be a father has infuriated Brittany. Then, a fight seemed to change everything for Jason and James, who were friends for nearly 2 decades!
programme.sub-title: DNA: Trauma Bonds Broken / Toxic Friendship Reunited

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Today, Karamo delves into LGBTQ experiences, joined by Big Freedia for a deep dive into New Orleans life. Don't miss it!
programme.sub-title: My Child's Father Won't Accept My Transition

programme.title: The Maury Show: Who's the Father of My 4 Kids... My Husband or My Lover?
programme.desc: Brian, his mother, and sister say that he didn't father Sarah's kid! Alicia cheated and doesn't know who her baby's father is! Two grandmas square off over a messy paternity feud!
programme.sub-title: Who's the Father of My 4 Kids... My Husband or My Lover?

programme.title: The Maury Show: After 27 Years: Are You Cheating With My Sister?
programme.desc: His name is St. Louis, but his girlfriend says unfaithful! What will our hidden cameras bust him doing? Then, what's Nino hiding from Shareen? Did he father Christmas' baby?
programme.sub-title: After 27 Years: Are You Cheating With My Sister?

programme.title: The Maury Show: You're Twice My Daughter's Age, You Cheater!
programme.desc: Furious mom Patty wants to prove that her daughter’s boyfriend Dale, a man twice her daughter’s age, has been cheating. Then, did Bam cheat on Brianna in his own bed?
programme.sub-title: You're Twice My Daughter's Age, You Cheater!

programme.title: The Maury Show: These Women Lied … The 3 Kids Aren't Mine!
programme.desc: Keisha knows that Desmond fathered her baby, but he wants her out of his life! Then, 2 desperate moms confront the man who fathered their 3 kids!
programme.sub-title: These Women Lied … The 3 Kids Aren't Mine!

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Cheated … Your 3 Kids Aren't His!
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki’s boyfriend Tavon is a cheater. What will they say when he is caught on our hidden camera? Then, are James’ kids with Nikkie actually his?
programme.sub-title: You Cheated … Your 3 Kids Aren't His!

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Robert is suing his young fling Latasha after claiming she damaged his property.
programme.sub-title: You Are 58 Trying to Date A 22-Year-Old!

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Trudy is suing bar owner Jefferey for damages because she claims a drunk patron plowed into her parked car.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Andrew is accusing his ex boss of assault and demands retribution for his back pain after the attack.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Arsenio is taking his ex-tenant to court after claiming she left the unit a mess including leaving two buckets of urine.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Arthur is suing his ex-fiancé for the price of her engagement ring after she refused to return it.
programme.sub-title: You Had A Wife, A Fiance, And A Mistress?

programme.title: Medium: A Cure For What Ails You
programme.desc: Allison has visions of a friend of Scanlon and Lynn DiNovi dying in a home mishap.
programme.sub-title: A Cure For What Ails You

programme.title: Medium: Car Trouble
programme.desc: Allison meets Meghan Doyle, Joe's new business partner. Meanwhile, her old car stops working and Joe surprises her with a nice looking used car.

programme.title: Medium: Being Joey Carmichael
programme.desc: Allison has dreams that help Scanlon in his search to find out who killed a wealthy local drug dealer.

programme.title: Medium: Drowned World
programme.desc: In the fourth season finale, Allison tries to help a young couple who thinks their house is haunted, but her efforts result in murder.

programme.title: Medium: Soul Survivor
programme.desc: Devalos' friend's sister is murdered and Allison tries to help solve the crime. Her dreams don't seem to make sense though, as they keep implicating the friend's first husband, who died two years ago, as the murderer.

programme.title: Medium: Things To Do In Phoenix When You're Dead
programme.desc: Allison dreams of a ghost who was a witness to several murders. Meanwhile, Ariel has a strange reaction to an assignment in health class.
programme.sub-title: Things To Do In Phoenix When You're Dead

programme.title: Medium: A Person Of Interest
programme.desc: While working on a 17 year-old-crime, Allison exhibits unusual behavior that may be pivotal in solving the case, but at the same time puts her family at risk.

programme.title: Medium: ...About Last Night
programme.desc: Allison wakes up under a freeway overpass, not knowing where she is or how she got there. Her lack of recent memory causes her to start thinking she may have killed someone with her car.

programme.title: Medium: A Taste Of Her Own Medicine
programme.desc: Allison is asked by Devalos to help some of his friends find their missing daughter, but encounters conflicting evidence of who is responsible for her disappearance.
programme.sub-title: A Taste Of Her Own Medicine

programme.title: Medium: Apocalypse...Now?
programme.desc: Several disturbing dreams of an impending apocalypse cause Allison to take drastic measures in preparation for the end of civilization.

programme.title: Medium: A Necessary Evil
programme.desc: Allison is visited once again by the ghost of Agent Cooper, who tries to help her figure out who the real murderer is in a confusing case.

programme.title: Medium: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: Allison has a dream about a game show that can detect lies, and upon waking up she hears a buzzer in her head whenever someone tells her a lie.

programme.title: Medium: All In The Family
programme.desc: Allison suspects that a missing woman may be a victim of her strange children. Meanwhile, Joe's sister Sarah shows up unannounced.

programme.title: Medium: Then...And Again
programme.desc: Allison wakes up five years in the past after she and Devalos are gunned down by a strange man. In the past, Allison's dreams tell her that Devalos is going to convict an innocent man of murder.

programme.title: Medium: The Devil Inside, Part One
programme.desc: A man named Lucas Harvey is stalking Allison, convinced that he's doing the work of God by getting rid of her and her ability.

programme.title: Medium: The Devil Inside, Part Two
programme.desc: Allison continues to be tormented by Lucas Harvey, her obsessed stalker. Harvey corrupts Allison's dreams, making her unhelpful to Devalos and Scanlon during a serial murderer case.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1
programme.desc: Allison leaves her job at the D.A.'s office after she's recruited to work for the Lydecker Corporation by another psychic who works there. While enjoying her new job, Allison still regrets leaving the D.A.'s office so suddenly.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2
programme.desc: While at her new job at the Lydecker Corporation, Allison shares the dreams she's been having of the serial killer in Phoenix with Devalos and Scanlon.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3
programme.desc: Allison struggles with her decision to switch jobs. When she continues to have visions about a serial killer she is forced to choose between honoring the contract with her new job and sharing her information with the police.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3

programme.title: Medium: The Man In The Mirror
programme.desc: After falling into a coma during an investigation, Allison's spirit finds it's way into the body of a man named Todd Emory. Joe and the kids have to adjust to living with Allison's spirit in the body of Todd, who insists on living with them.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: A recovery officer struggles after a truck ends up in a ditch in difficult conditions.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: In Corby a 16-metre lorry loaded with waste flips over near a busy roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A team rescues an overturned mixer full of cement. A driver faces hydraulic problems.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A lorry fire poses endless problems for recovery, with burning ash complicating matters.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: A tipped-over shipment of A4 paper ends up being a tough task to take on.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A crew trying to take care of a burned-out trailer struggles due to its missing wheels.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Three veteran recovery experts struggle with a terribly trashed truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alpha Recovery join the team, tackling a 45-tonne crane that's become a pain.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kev tackles a big bin lorry, and Aidan has a brush with a bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: After a lorry rolls over under power lines, making a race for time.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A 50 ton construction machine and the 20 ton trailer carrying it land in a stream.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A 50-ton construction machine is stranded by a severely-damaged Victorian bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A recovery crew work to rescue an articulated lorry that fell down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sean tackles a telehandler that has flipped over in the back of a very muddy garden.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: On the M25 near Enfield two lorries, two cars and a van have piled into each other.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: A 40-tonne lorry careers off the M1 and plunges down an embankment into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: On the M11, a loaded truck is marooned after a rear axle collapsed while at full speed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: In Northumberland, a 32-tonne tipper gets lost in the dark and ends up stuck in a field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Kevin is called to a challenging recovery: a 75-tonne crane stranded in the countryside.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac
programme.desc: Widespread thievery is discovered in the city when Ninja Turtle artifacts are found missing. April and Irma prowl for the pilfering poachers, the investigation leads the reporter to the estate of Monroe Q.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtles
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Menace Maestro, Please
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day
programme.desc: The half-shelled heroes find themselves competing with Bruce Bent, the Gadgetman, a self-proclaimed superhero from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.
programme.sub-title: Son of Return of the Fly II

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.
programme.sub-title: Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.
programme.sub-title: Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rhino-Man
programme.desc: When multi-billionaire J. Gordon Hungerdunger sponsors a superhero competition, the city goes crazy with good guys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman
programme.desc: Meet Bugman: he's Michelangelo's favourite comic book mutant superhero of all time. And today, he's real and in trouble.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Slippery Slope

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Field of Schemes

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Matchy Matchy

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Gay Discount
programme.desc: Mr. Kim offers a gay discount at the store, while Mrs. Kim tries to find Janet a cool, Christian, Korean boyfriend.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Photos
programme.desc: Mr. Kim gets competitive with Janet over who is the better photographer. When Jung applies for a promotion, it has a surprising effect on Mrs. Kim and Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Ddong Chim

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Frank and Nayoung
programme.desc: Mr. Kim is frustrated with Frank, a repairman who talks too much, while Janet's cousin Nayoung visits from Korea, challenging Janet's sense of what it means to "be Korean."

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Wingman
programme.desc: Mr. Chin asks Mr. Kim to be his wingman on a date, which is fine until Mrs. Kim tags along. Janet asks Jung to help her fix a dripping pipe at the store, but the repair is interrupted by an intruder.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Rude Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Kim disciplines Janet's professor's kid, with unexpected results for Janet. Jung discovers that Kimchee has found a questionable way to make extra money.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hapkido

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Service
programme.desc: A new female pastor strikes a chord with Appa. Jung's worlds collide when his friend starts dating his sister.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Best Before

programme.title: Corporate: The Void

programme.title: Corporate: The Powerpoint of Death
programme.desc: The Powerpoint of Death: Matt creates an impressive presentation to pitch Hampton DeVille's arms dealings to the CIA, while Jake takes advantage of the company's internal whistleblower app. (S1, E02)

programme.title: Corporate: The Pain of Being Alive
programme.desc: The Pain of Being Alive: After his surgery, Jake's co-workers butter him up in the hopes that he'll share his prescription painkillers with them, and visions of a ghost haunt Matt. (S1, E03)

programme.title: Corporate: Trademarq
programme.desc: Trademarq: Hampton DeVille partners with a street artist who vandalised the company's headquarters to sell anti-corporate merch and profit off its protesters. (S1, E04)

programme.title: Corporate: Corporate Retreat
programme.desc: Corporate Retreat: At the Hampton DeVille corporate retreat, business gurus teach Matt how to be a more confident person, and Jake finds love at a networking mixer. (S1, E05)

programme.title: Corporate: Casual Friday

programme.title: Corporate: The Long Meeting

programme.title: Corporate: Society Tomorrow
programme.desc: Society Tomorrow: As the staff obsesses over a prestige TV show, Jake resists their attempts to force him to watch, while Matt's life starts to eerily echo the events of the series. (S1, E08)

programme.title: Corporate: Weekend
programme.desc: Weekend: John pressures Jake and Matt into helping him move a grandfather clock in his apartment, sabotaging their weekend plans. (S1, E09)

programme.title: Corporate: Remember Day

programme.title: Corporate: The One Who's There

programme.title: Corporate: The Concert
programme.desc: The Concert: When Matt's old college buddy invites him to hang out, he's determined to prove he's still young and fun. Nihilistic, satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E02)

programme.sub-title: Feuding Ex's Children Caught In The Crossfire

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Connie wrote Dr. Phil for help, concerned for her grandchildren. Jennifer's daughter drank bleach from her sippy cup when she was 3 and was found with a backpack of maggots, mold and rotten milk at 7. Dr. Phil delves into Jennifer's history as a parent.
programme.sub-title: Maggots, Mold And Rotting Milk: A Mother Accused

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kim & ex-husband, Ryan, are terrified of son, Rylan, 7, who has a fascination with knives, talks to an imaginary friend named "Bleeder", and has sent two teachers to the hospital. What might be causing Rylan's aggressive behavior?
programme.sub-title: Our 7-Year-Old Son Threatens To Kill Us

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil deals with several important issues about the body: conquering erectile dysfunction, taming a fitness obsession, and beating blushing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Death threats, stalking, delusions, drinking, breaking and entering, are listed in the protective order Bo has against ex-wife, Amber. Bo is afraid for his safety and also their 2 kids. Could it be a trauma Amber never dealt with involving a murder? Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Death Threats, Stalking: Amber's Ex Husband Speaks Out Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 2. A never-before-aired interview with Dahmer's father and stepmother that sheds light on the monster behind the man. They provide chilling details about his bizarre childhood behaviors.
programme.sub-title: Raising Evil: The Interview With Jeffrey Dahmer's Dad Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Stephanie was an aspiring songwriter who loved taking care of kids. Diana was a preschool teacher with a bright future. Neither of these women knew they could end up addicted to drugs.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From petty theft to check fraud, Dr. Phil's guests say they are addicted to stealing, and it is destroying their families.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Susan is desperate to help son, JJ, 27. She says JJ is a lazy, unemployed, violent moocher. Husband Steven, says his wife bought a camper & relocated JJ to the backyard, where she continues to bring food & money. That she's the "ultimate enabler".
programme.sub-title: Our Mooching, Violent, Lazy Son Who Lives In Our Back Yard!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: David says daughter, Danielle, 21, is out of control. She's been arrested twice, once for "clocking" a man she was dating in the face, & the second for public intoxication. She has violent rages, refuses to take her meds, does drugs, & drives drunk.Pt. 1
programme.sub-title: Our 21-Year-Old Daughter Is Gorgeous, Wild And Violent Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julia & daugther Olivia, now 22, say Olivia's newborn daughter was taken illegally. Jyllian, who adopted Olivia's daughter, promised to provide pictures of the little girl & an opportunity to be part of her life. Jyllian says the adoption was legal. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: The Woman I Believe Illegally Adopted My Granddaughter Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From curing rare forms of cancer to foreseeing mass destruction, to freeing others from sickness and sin, Julia believes she is "God's chosen prophet". Parents, Mark and Cheryll, worry their daughter is mentally ill with deep concern for the grandkids.
programme.sub-title: I Am God's Prophet And My Family Is Trying To Destroy Me

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 11
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson heads to the German HQ of the Dakar rally winning Mini X-Raid team, to experience the three toughest jobs in motorsport. She'll learn how to be a navigator, mechanic and driver before taking on Dakar rally legend Nani Roma

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 12
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind-the-scenes at America's biggest motor race, the Indy 500. He hears what makes the event so special from triple winner Dario Franchitti, reveals the technical differences between F1 cars and Indy cars

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 13
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato hold a track battle between two executive cars with over 1000bhp between them. The brand new Audi RS6 and Mercedes E63 AMG are both designed to demolish autobahns

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 14
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson learns the skills needed to drive in the Special Forces, from former Royal Marine sniper Aldo Kane.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 15
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to Le Mans, to race in the European version of legendary American race series NASCAR – the world's most popular motorsport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 16
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is in France, experiencing the action packed world of Rallycross; a cross between rallying and circuit racing, where 650bhp machines battle door to door.

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Mom's Minivan
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. X and the guys take a worn out Mama's Minivan and make it fit for a 'Glamour Girl'.

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: 508 Maxima
programme.desc: X and the guys create a fantasy car! Complete with reverse gull wing doors, a cotton candy machine, and even a robotic arm!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Ford
programme.desc: X and the G.A.S. crew surprise the owner of a Ford Festiva with a big pimpin' a nitrous system, a racing body kit, a 'tower of power' and a telescoping sound and video system!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: Chamillionaire fills in for X and finds a comic book lover who's obsessed by the Fantastic Four, so the guys at G.A.S. turn this fan's beat down ride into a chromed out 'Silver Surfer'

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Ford Econoline/Doggie Van
programme.desc: X finds a mobile doggie grooming company owner with one mangy mutt of a car. G.A.S. pimp out the car with a top-of-the-line doggie washing station, plasma TVs, and a hydraulics door!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Jeep Grand Wagoneer
programme.desc: X pimps a Jeep owned by a contractor who's always on the go. The guys at G.A.S. give it a 'lowrider' style paint job and airbags, and add the ultimate contractors tool box to the back!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Pontiac
programme.desc: X and the guys take in a Pontiac Sunbird. This beat down convertible's getting a new lease on life as a 'Tiki-mobile', complete with Tiki graphics, binoculars and an Italian ice machine!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Crown Victoria Station Wagon
programme.desc: X surprises an nurse by turning her 1984 Ford Crown Victoria station wagon into a hot-rod style ambulance, with a CATscan-style sound system and a video monitor shaped like a defibrillator!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Chevy Cavalier
programme.desc: X and the guys turn a Chevy Cavalier into a one of a kind sparkly 'root-beer' painted creation - complete with a gumball machine, a scrapbooking station and virtual reality gaming seats!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Subaru Impreza
programme.desc: Xzibit and the crew take aim at a 1996 Subaru Impreza. They turn the owner's ride into a 'rally car' with off-road tires, authentic rally graphics and a big load of paintball gear!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Cadillac Hearse
programme.desc: X surprises the owner of a Cadillac hearse with a 'macabre mobile' complete with a velvet interior, a 42 inch monitor, and a motorized coffin that contains a barbeque grill and refrigerator!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Daihatsu HiJet
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old car into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Wyatt gets his 1988 Daihatsu Hi-Jet pimped with a mini-fridge, guitar amp and DVD player.

programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Nile gets her 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille pimped with heart-shaped break lights.

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Maddox is home but Talia's struggling post C-Section. Sophie invests in her own beauty business. Marnie's dream house move might be back on and Government travel restrictions impact Holly. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron misses his train to a press conference announcing his big fight, will he make it in time? Holly gets a tattoo removed and Marnie has her baby scan. Gary invites Aaron to meet Chester. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie and Casey do a photo shoot for OK! Magazine. Holly takes a class in public speaking and it's date night for Gary and Emma. The stress of Aaron's upcoming fight is beginning to show. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie gives Casey a sexy birthday present. Holly faces her fears at Sussex Uni. Aaron meets up with Nathan and Sam to talk about mental health. Emma has a big surprise for Gary. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie shows off her baby bump in a magazine shoot. Gary plays golf with Chris Hughes. Aaron's shocked to find out who his opponent is in his MMA fight and Holly says a tearful goodbye. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Gary and Emma share some special news and Aaron gets stuck into training. Holly goes to the House of Lords and Marnie and Casey get a shock when an photo of Casey is sent to a newspaper. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie could give birth at any moment. Sophie opens up to Holly about her heartbreak. Chester gives Gary the run around and Aaron faces up to the reality of becoming a Dad. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Big Boss Anna shocks the Squad when she sends in some new workers to join them. The lads are excited but Sophie and Chloe aren’t so sure and things quickly go west. (S14, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Aaron and Marty decide to get close to newbies Sarah and Abbie. After her kick-off with Zahida, Chloe gets some big news. And the family is stunned when two more new workers arrive. (S14, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Nathan plans to test how radge the new workers are. Chloe returns, Marnie and Marty kick off over Aaron and there’s a huge shock when the next newbie arrives. Marty reaches out to Chloe. (S14, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Marty's plan to win Elettra over with a new hair colour goes west. Marnie's worried she's sending out mixed signals to Aaron. And when a new radgie arrives Chloe is all over him. (S14, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Marnie’s excited when the next arrival turns up, until Aaron gets stuck in and leaves her with a big decision. Marty’s desperate to step it up with Elettra but Chloe has other ideas. (S14, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The house is stunned to discover that Marnie left after Aaron and Chelsea got together. Elettra and Marty boot off over their hot tub frisk and Chloe pushes Marty to breaking point. (S14, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Boss Anna sends the squad to the French Alps. Scotty T’s back and immediately gets stuck into the newbies, and when Anna reveals her latest decision for the new workers Marty isn't happy. (S14, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It’s proper awks between the newbies, while Scotty T and Abbie begin to get closer. Zahida goes mental at Marty and Gaz gets his revenge on Sam. Marnie's back and gets properly mortal. (S14, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It's the squad's last days on the piste. Aaron is on the pull with wingman Gaz, it's pure awks between Abbie and Sarah over Scotty T, and things get worse when he tries it on with Zahida. (S14, ep9)

programme.desc: Arthritic golden retriever Brody enjoys some aqua therapy and vestibular problems are throwing shih tzu Max off balance. Plus, at the zoo a young cheetah needs dental treatment.

programme.title: ER Vets

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Dr James operates on a small zebra finch, and Dr Lucinda takes care of Froggie, the coral-fingered frog who is actually blue. Dr Shane treats a snake-necked turtle whose boil has burst through its shell.

programme.title: OUTmusic

programme.title: The General
programme.desc: Maria Luisa fights for the rights and privileges which, in her time, are reserved almost exclusively for men, even taking on a false male identity.

programme.title: Back to Corsica
programme.desc: While Andrea goes for a dip in the pool with Alice, in full seduction mode, Marie-Luce heads to a hotel room for a date.

programme.title: Back to Corsica

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: The remote islands off Coromandel hold Milan’s favorite fish — and plenty of them. It’s a rod-bending island-hopping adventure.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: Fishing from their upgraded kayaks, Milan and Lubin discover just how exciting — and exhausting — chasing snapper and kingfish up close can be.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: Cold nights, warm results — Milan and Nathan tough it out for great rewards, while Lubin takes to the shoreline with a fly rod in hand.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: Kayak vs. boat — Lubin paddles close to shore for monster snapper while Nathan ventures deep chasing the bigger predators of the blue.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: It’s solo mission time for Nathan at the rugged North Cape. The snapper are big, the battles are brutal, and he’s on his own.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: Milan heads to Australia to chase the elusive Murray River cod while Nathan gears up with a new boat and truck back home.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: Milan and Nathan take the Techno Viking on its first voyage and are met by a frenzy of eager fish welcoming the boat’s debut.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: Nathan’s new lure proves irresistible to big snapper, while Milan rounds out the trip with trophy kingfish from Whitianga.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: Milan’s trout obsession hits hard, so he heads inland with a guide while Nathan and FlyGuy enjoy river serenity and great fly action.

programme.title: Big Angry Fish
programme.desc: From peaceful kahawai fishing to explosive kingfish and marlin encounters, Milan and Nathan end the day weary and victorious.

programme.title: Survivorman: Top Ten
programme.desc: Les reviews his experiences surviving in the wild. While counting down ten wilderness survival issues he has faced, he shows segments of both shows relevant to each item.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on purpose, accompanied by his long-time survival buddy Bob Wilson, on a deserted island in the Kingdom of Tonga.

programme.title: Survivorman: Giants of the Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the wilderness of remote Alberta to investigate evidence of Sasquatch activity. Armed with infrared camera and thermal imaging technology, Les investigates reports of Bigfoot sightings in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Survivorman: Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Through the perilous jungle Survivorman treks deep, with the help of a couple of local guides. Led off the beaten path he is deserted alone in this primordial landscape.

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG: Impact
programme.desc: Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG: Act of Terror
programme.desc: When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG: The Black Jet
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG: Silent Service
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Greenie Board
programme.desc: Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG: True Calling
programme.desc: When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Rouge
programme.desc: As the lowest ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS: Yard Work
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over an wrinkly infant's shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.

programme.title: COPS: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: COPS: To the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner was held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mommy's Tears
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in hiding is sniffed out quickly by the K-9 unit, a couple gets caught lying when an officer recognizes them, and a woman's dogs save her a trip to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS: Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Bible Buddies
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is apprehended after trying to evade arrest, a convicted felon is detained when police make some illegal discoveries in his van, and deputies seize a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS: Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: COPS: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police help a man evacuate a house fire, a high-speed chase yields only minor infractions, and an officer interrogates a parolee with meth in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a suspicious pedestrian, police and their K-9 dog search for weapons in a suspect's vehicle, and a wanted woman is stopped on a moped with her pet dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS: Time to Climb
programme.desc: A couple flee a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.
