programme.title: The Love Boat: The Spoonmaker Diamond - Part 1
programme.desc: A famous diamond is stolen from a museum in Istanbul just as the Pacific Princess is sailing the Aegean Sea. Doc proposes marriage to a beautiful woman who is more interested in someone else.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Spoonmaker Diamond - Part 2
programme.desc: Romance and intrigue combine with the mystery of a famous international jewel as The Love Boat sails amid the scenic beauty of the Aegean Sea - including the glorious sights of the Greek Islands and Turkey.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 1
programme.desc: While the Pacific Princess sails through the beautiful waters of Italy, a seemingly happy couple (Shelly Winters and Ernest Borgnine) reveals that their relationship is far from perfect.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 2
programme.desc: Love, adventure and romantic hijinks are afloat when The Love Boat sails to the beautiful Eternal City of Rome and the sites of glorious Capri and Venice in a special two-hour premiere.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.
programme.sub-title: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace

programme.title: The Love Boat: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.
programme.sub-title: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life
programme.desc: A woman's (Greer Garson) ability to see the future may hinder her relationship with an attractive man. Plus, a single mother thinks she meets a divorced man traveling with his daughter, but that's not exactly the case.
programme.sub-title: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Presence
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Groupies/ The Audition/ Doc'S Nephew
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.
programme.sub-title: The Groupies/ The Audition/ Doc'S Nephew

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain's Replacement/ Sly As A Fox/ Here Comes The Bride -- Maybe
programme.desc: When Gopher suspects a skipper under Capt. Stubing's tutelage is trying to take his job, the crew jumps into action to protect their boss. Meanwhile, a lovely lady causes havoc when she boards with two men who are each after her hand.
programme.sub-title: The Captain's Replacement/ Sly As A Fox/ Here Comes The Bride -- Maybe

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Daisy/ Our Son, The Lawyer/ Salvaged Romance
programme.desc: A woman's (Joan Rivers) shyness around men is exacerbated by her recent mastectomy that is until she meets an understanding man. Meanwhile, when a married couple contemplates divorce, it's their son, who's also a lawyer, that gets caught in the middle.
programme.sub-title: Gopher's Daisy/ Our Son, The Lawyer/ Salvaged Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: Fountain Of Youth/ Bad Luck Cabin/ Uncle Daddy
programme.desc: When an elderly man's granddaughter falls for one of his fresh-faced friends, the man seeks out some of the youth potion for himself. Meanwhile, things start moving a little too fast for Isaac and the woman he's dating.
programme.sub-title: Fountain Of Youth/ Bad Luck Cabin/ Uncle Daddy

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Professor Has Class/ When The Magic Disappears/ We, The Jury
programme.desc: A sarcastic woman (Anne Meara) goes on a rampage when she finds out she's on a cruise with the same man she's suing (Jerry Stiller) for damages. Meanwhile, a famous professor meets a former student who is hired to replace his mentor/
programme.sub-title: The Professor Has Class/ When The Magic Disappears/ We, The Jury

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain's Crush/ Out Of My Hair/ Off-Course Romance
programme.desc: When Stubing meets a gorgeous movie queen (Joan Collins), who recently shed her ninth husband, he is fascinated by her charm and beauty. Then, a man decides to prioritize golf over his wife, so the neglected woman decides to play ball with an old friend.
programme.sub-title: The Captain's Crush/ Out Of My Hair/ Off-Course Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: Discount Romance/ Vicky'S Dilemma/ Loser, And Still Champ
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.
programme.sub-title: Discount Romance/ Vicky'S Dilemma/ Loser, And Still Champ

programme.title: The Love Boat: So Help Me Hannah/ The Maid Cleans Up/ Cpr, I.O.U
programme.desc: The vivacious Hannah Harvye (Mary Martin) immediately becomes involved with the crew and rekindles a romance with an old flame. An unassuming man (Ben Murphy) finds himself in a tight situation with a maid he's never met. Gopher saves a man's life.
programme.sub-title: So Help Me Hannah/ The Maid Cleans Up/ Cpr, I.O.U

programme.title: The Love Boat: Love Boat - The World's Greatest Kisser/ Don'T Take My Wife, Please/ The Reluctant Father
programme.desc: A jilted fiance hires a Mata Hari (Elaine Joyce) to find the crew member that ruined his wedding plans; a junior executive (Parker Stevenson) suffers in silence while his boss (David Doyle) lusts after his bride.
programme.sub-title: Love Boat - The World's Greatest Kisser/ Don'T Take My Wife, Please/ The Reluctant Father

programme.title: The Love Boat: Affair On Demand/ Friend Of The Family/ Just Another Pretty Face
programme.desc: A married couple finds out that their daughter is in love with the father's best friend, while a progressive woman agrees to help her romantic partner have an affair.
programme.sub-title: Affair On Demand/ Friend Of The Family/ Just Another Pretty Face

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Bump In The Night
programme.desc: Lexi strikes a homeless man with her car. She tries to turn herself in, but Peter arranges for Bob to receive free treatment, and ships him off to a rehab hospital.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Tree Talks In Melrose
programme.desc: Michael pulls out all the stops in an attempt to win back Megan. Brett fears that his plan is succeeding when Megan decides not to serve Michael with divorce papers until after Christmas.

programme.title: Melrose Place: To Kill A Whirlybird
programme.desc: Michael is forced to turn over his share of the cauterizing glove company to Brett. He threatens to use his clout as chief-of-staff to have the company blackballed.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Amanda's Back
programme.desc: Kyle and Billy accompany the rescue team into the woods to find Amanda and Samantha.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Kyle Of The Desert
programme.desc: Kyle experiences nightmares about Christine, a lover who died in the Gulf War.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Coup De Grace
programme.desc: Taylor visits Nick in Dallas. After they sleep together, she convinces him to help her break up Kyle and Amanda.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mama Mia
programme.desc: Jennifer warns Michael that their mother, Mia, is coming for a visit. Jennifer and Michael get into trouble shortly after Mom arrives.

programme.title: Melrose Place
programme.desc: Christine tries to convince Kyle to move on with his life. Later, Peter shows up in Sterling's hotel room with a tape recorder in the hopes of proving that Sterling is to blame for their rift.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Swing And A Mrs.
programme.desc: Kyle discovers a suicide note from Christine. He leaves the wedding, hoping to save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Blunt Drama
programme.desc: Christine tries to back out of Nick's scam but Taylor threatens her when she tries to leave town.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Christine Runs Through It
programme.desc: Taylor and Nick order Christine to display signs of suicidal behavior in order to trick Peter, but he is too savvy for them.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Too Romantic For Words
programme.desc: Nick and Taylor send Amanda a note leading her to believe that Christine is going to commit suicide.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Four Affairs And A Pregnancy
programme.desc: Billy dedicates himself to making his marriage work, although he is still drawn to Jennifer.

programme.title: Melrose Place: M.P. Confidential
programme.desc: Sam is put off when Billy begins smothering her with attention. It doesn't help when she finds out his family believes they are engaged.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Nasty Minded Professor
programme.desc: Jennifer tries to help Jeff win back Samantha. Although she rejects him at first, Sam later grows jealous when she sees Jennifer having dinner with Jeff.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Divorce Dominican Style
programme.desc: Kyle tries to manipulate Taylor into revealing the truth about her scheme involving Christine. Amanda and Kyle's divorce is finalized.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Long Way To Tip-A-Roy
programme.desc: Rory poisons Amanda after she refuses to give him a share of the agency, then tries to stab Kyle. Peter admits his love for Amanda and breaks up with Lexi.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Match Made In Hell
programme.desc: Overcome with guilt about Lexi's plight, Megan convinces Brett to marry Lexi. Michael rebuffs Taylor's attempts to turn him into a responsible father.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party
programme.sub-title: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Witch Trash
programme.desc: A family feud erupts when hillbilly cousins (Loni Anderson and Alice Ghostley) arrive from the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: To Tell A Mortal
programme.desc: It’s Friday the 13th, and for one day only, Sabrina can tell her friends she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves
programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.
programme.sub-title: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Claus
programme.desc: A special visitor from the Other Realm helps Sabrina recapture the true spirit of Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Little Big Kraft
programme.desc: Tired of Mr. Kraft’s harsh rules, Sabrina concocts a potion to make him act like a teenager.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: 5 Easy Pieces Of Libby
programme.desc: Libby is even harder to figure out after Sabrina accidentally turns her into a jigsaw puzzle.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Finger Lickin’ Flu
programme.desc: Sabrina catches the flu in her pointing finger and accidentally transfers her magic to a teacher.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina & The Beanstalk
programme.desc: Sabrina’s beanstalk is right out of a fairytale, but it’s more like a nightmare for Harvey

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Roland the troll takes Valentine’s Day too far when he steals Sabrina’s heart.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Band Show
programme.desc: Egos soar out of control when Sabrina uses magic to become a rock star.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: My Nightmare The Car
programme.desc: A talking car causes Sabrina a big headache.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Quiz Show
programme.desc: Sabrina realizes the importance of her Quizmaster after she inadvertently gets him fired.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Nutty Hill is suffering from a stifling heat wave. Searching in vain for a bit of cool air, Grizzy suddenly has a brilliant idea.

programme.desc: Just as Grizzly was about to coat a nice big fresh salmon with chocolate spread and snuggle up in front of the TV, he discovers that the pantry is empty.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.sub-title: The Snowman Who Didn't Want to Melt

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Mixo has decided to learn hieroglyphics, but if he really wants to do that, he needs to see the real thing, in Egypt. Ollie draws a camel, and off they go.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Today is Mustard's birthday, and the MiniWhats are trying to figure out what to get him.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Raoul is worried about his parents' plans to move. Ollie draws a very strange house. It looks tiny from the outside, but once they get inside, it's much bigger.
programme.sub-title: The House That Grows and Grows

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Raoul wakes up from a nightmare, and Ollie is drawing a forest. Suddenly, a little girl seems to fall from the sky. It's Claraputter the witch, an apprentice witch who isn't very good with spells and has just had an accident with her broom.
programme.sub-title: The Witch Who Fell From the Sky

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Petula wishes she were rich so she could travel to faraway places, so Ollie draws her a treasure island. Raoul falls overboard, and the MiniWhats end up in the belly of a whale. They meet a strange pirate who helps them get back to dry land.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The MiniWhats have presentations to prepare for school. Ollie draws a car and they set off on a safari to prehistoric times. They see a dachshund that goes on forever, volcanoes, and a huge mammoth.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The class trip is the same every year. If only they'd go to the moon for a change. Ollie draws a rocket and off they go. But the moon is boring, as all it has is a museum.
programme.sub-title: The Class Trip to The Moon

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Except for Mixo, the MiniWhats don't like eating their vegetables. Ollie draws a table, and they find themselves at Giacommo's, a restaurant that specialises in strange vegetables.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Pamela has had trouble sleeping ever since her Teddy Bear disappeared under her bed. Ollie helps the MiniWhats find it. They escape many dangers on the way to find Pamela's teddy bear Nanouk. It turns out Nanouk is happy and living a new life.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Cleo tries to make a home-cooked meal to raise Clawdeen's spirits and cure her homesickness.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Ghoulia helps Lagoona find her secret toy, investigating all their classmates to find the culprit.
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Missing Squeak

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Cleo gets a new pet, Hissette, and needs help from Deuce and Frankie when she runs away.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Finnegan battles his own self-doubt and a giant kraken in order to become the next bandleader.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: When Toralei's mum substitute teaches, Toralei and Clawdeen become unlikely partners.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Catarina proposes a monstrous trade: the Moon Claw for Selena Wolf's diary, which may hold the key to Selena's return.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: When the Were Beasts get tasked with an impossible group midterm, Clawdeen is assigned as their leader and must learn from her mum's legacy and take the first step toward leading the pack.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Clawdeen must learn from her mum's legacy to start her journey toward future pack leader.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Watzie and Count Fabulous accidentally stumble into the human world and try to make it home safe.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Twyla must complete a rite of passage by pursuing a Night Terror through her friends' nightmares.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Draculaura and Toralei find themselves magically stuck together on Ghoul Spirit Day after a friendship bracelet spell goes wrong, all the while, Clawdeen and Frankie have to track down a codex.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: When Heath's dad, Hades, crashes his Scareer Day field trip, the father and son need to listen to each other in order to save Monster High from an invading swarm of vicious pixies.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Deuce prepares for a trip but his twin sisters try to scare him out of the idea.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: When the Monster Talismans start to go missing, Clawd must evade Bloodgood's hall monitor horse, Nightmare, to catch the thief.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: When Barkimedes and Howleen ask Clawdeen to show them the human world, Clawdeen battles her insecurity that humanity is boring.

programme.title: Monster High

programme.title: Monster High

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Skelita wants to honour her abuela through a fashion design contest, but her plans are derailed when her original gown is ruined.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Draculaura must discover her unique witchy power to get accepted into a special summer witchcraft camp.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Frankie wants to ask Cleo to the Monster Ball with an epic Monster Match, but they have to get to Cleo before Deuce.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Following the teenage children of famous monsters as they discover who they are, embrace their differences and learn to be fierce and fearless at the one place where they all belong.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Clawdeen, Draculaura, Frankie, and the rest of the boo crew must save the Monster Ball and the world.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Draculaura convinces students that it is time for the monsters to come up with their own holiday.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad searches a tropical island for fabled water monster Gil. But before travelling back to Monster High, an island volcano begins to erupt.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: In an effort to save Gil's island, the ghouls travel to an icy mountain range to find a ghoul with ice powers to stop the imminent volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Toralei complicates the Ghoul Squad's latest mission to find a hidden monster deep inside ancient catacombs when she tries to take an artefact that triggers the ancient cave's traps.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad travels to Paris to recruit a gargoyle. But Rochelle can't leave until the ghouls help her deal with a troublesome, roof-destroying gargoyle named Rockspierre.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The ghouls make it their mission to help Catty get over her stage fright by performing in the upcoming Monster High talent show.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash hears of a training ground for wild Charizard and decides it's just the place to hone his own Charizard’s strength. But the tough lessons to be learned there will change Ash and Charizard’s friendship forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road to the Azalea Gym, our heroes discover a Sunflora festival in a nearby town and meet a Trainer whose Sunflora is too sad to compete. Can Ash and the gang put a smile on its face?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash is having a hard time getting his Chikorita to listen to him, and Nurse Joy thinks that it’s due to a bout of jealousy over Ash’s friendship with Pikachu! Can Ash prove how much Chikorita means to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Hoppip partners can predict the weather. But on the horizon, there are two storms approaching...and one of them goes by the name 'Team Rocket'!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The legendary superhero Gligarman grows old and is beginning to consider hanging up his cape. When Ash and friends wander into town, they bring with them a challenge that could be his final fight: Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When an unruly herd of Mareep ruin their lunch plans, our heroes decide to help their timid herder in time to compete in a local battle festival.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When the top student at a Pokémon training center loses interest in Pokémon battles, opting to build a comprehensive Pokémon database instead, it’s up to Ash to convince him that battling is not just about probability!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When Ash finds a Cyndaquil in the wild, he is eager to catch it...but you can bet he’s not the only one!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Arriving in Azalea Town, Ash carelessly provokes its residents, who adore SlowPoké. And things only look worse as Team Rocket arrives, meaning to snag every last SlowPoké! What can Ash do?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: As he promised Professor Oak, Ash delivers the mysterious GS Ball to a renowned Poké Ball expert. But the fruits of his labor are almost spoiled when Team Rocket bursts onto the scene!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash has finally reached the Azalea Gym, but Cyndaquil isn’t quite fired up enough to take on the Gym Leader. As the battle heats up, Ash has to give his all to take on the powerful Bug-type Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: An inexperienced young Trainer has managed to scare off his own Farfetch’d. Our heroes are happy to help him out, but they'll have to find it before Team Rocket does!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: At an annual Pokémon trading festival, a young Trainer is looking for a good trade for his Wobbuffet. The Team Rocket trio are looking for opportunities as well, but both sets of Trainers get more than they bargain for!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: An unexpected Pokémon firefighting competition reunites our heroes with some old friends, the Squirtle Squad! But they are in desperate need of some leadership, so Ash and Squirtle rejoin the ranks.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When they stumble upon a preschool for Wooper and an emergency calls the teacher away, our heroes come to the rescue! But, as always, Team Rocket is around the corner and up to no good…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On the way to Goldenrod City, our heroes are forced to head through a tunnel guarded by angry Onix. To make it more difficult, Team Rocket, Snubbull, and Jigglypuff drop in for a visit…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Following a string of mysterious thefts, our heroes discover some Houndour struggling to survive in the wild. To help these thieving Pokémon mend their ways, Ash and friends will first have to earn their trust.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash and Misty’s rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile’s new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock’s Vulpix and Ash’s Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash’s Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill’s heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: After seeing a sign in the forest warning them about mischievous Ghost-type Pokémon, our heroes reach a town whose residents use Psychic types to repel them. But soon some spooky news arrives: a giant Gengar is on the loose!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it’s just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some 'professional actors,' the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn’t long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When an ex-student of Professor Oak’s discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Pidgey Express courier service is in need of our heroes' helping hands, especially when Team Rocket wants to have the delivery Pidgey signed, sealed, and delivered to the Boss!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Caught in a sudden downpour, our heroes find a castle clinic that uses Pokémon healers to help patients. But when Brock and the doctor end up trapped in the castle's labyrinth, a helping hand is needed to get them out!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After meeting the elderly owner of a Pokémon dojo, Ash is called upon to replace the man's granddaughter as the chosen heir! But when a vicious challenger approaches, can Ash help defend the dojo from destruction?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Chikorita, Cyndaquil, and Totodile find themselves separated from the group and stuck in a ravine! When Meowth finds himself stuck too, an unlikely partnership forms!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Misty is reeled into a rivalry at a local Seaking fishing competition. Can she come out on top?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Pokémon breeding contest gives our heroes a chance to compete, greet an old friend, and defeat Team Rocket once again!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When Ash comes down with a serious stomachache far from any hospital, a local healer and his Shuckle companions are on task to set him right!
