programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: A young peasant, with no interest in adventure or fortune, is mistaken as the kingdom's only hope when a horrible monster threatens the countryside.

programme.title: Return of the Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite muck-encrusted plant-man is back in this tongue-in-cheek action-adventure which was the sequel to the original cult classic Swamp Thing and based on the award-winning D.C. Comics series. Starring: Heather Locklear, Louis Jourdan

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his gruesome experiments. Starring: Peter Cushing, Francis Matthews, Eunice Gayson

programme.title: Underworld: Legend of the Jinn
programme.desc: Shawn discovers there is far more to his world when he receives a cryptic message warning him of a curse that has afflicted his family for generations. Shawn then discovers revelations that set him on a collision course with the unknown.

programme.title: Shark Attack 3 Megalodon
programme.desc: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon is a “jaws”-dropping action thriller from the director of Kickboxer starring John Barrowman and Jenny McShane. When two researchers discover a colossal shark's tooth off the Mexican coast their worst fears surface.

programme.title: A Werewolf In England
programme.desc: Two people take refuge from a storm at a remote countryside Inn. They soon uncover a deadly pact between the strange Innkeepers and flesh-hungry werewolves. The guests must band together and fight tooth and nail to survive the night!

programme.title: An American Werewolf in Paris
programme.desc: An American man unwittingly gets involved with French werewolves who are able to transform at will.

programme.title: The Bat
programme.desc: A crazed killer known as "The Bat" is on the loose in a mansion full of people.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: While the Cat's Away
programme.desc: Brothers Dwight and Stu are willing to do just about anything to come up with the money for a new P-11 Baja Sandslicer dirtbike, including stealing.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Nature
programme.desc: On a family picnic, brothers Rick and Teddy spend their time keeping three year-old sister Becky out of trouble, and waging war on a hill of ants with squirt guns and magnifying glasses.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Pleasant Screams
programme.desc: Strict teacher Felix Purdy has always been tough on his students, particularly on introverted dreamer Daryl Kregman.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Gone Fishin' / A Little Body of Work
programme.desc: Young Randy is reluctant to accompany his Uncle Ned on a fishing trip. / Delinquents Eddie and Herman have a bad habit of stealing parts for their hot rod from cars on the street.
programme.sub-title: Gone Fishin' / A Little Body of Work

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Self-centered and conceited Prince Charming has only two goals in life: to look maahvelous, daaahling, and to reach the castle of Sleeping Beauty in order to kiss her out of her spell.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Works In Wax
programme.desc: Craig and William are just about the only two people left who care about Rottmucker's Wax Museum and its collection of classic monsters.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E11 - Unrealized Reality
programme.desc: Crichton falls into a wormhole and meets up with a strange man who shows Crichton the consequences of wormhole travel.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E12 - Kansas
programme.desc: After accidentally returning to Earth, Crichton discovers he is in 1985 and he has altered the timeline.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E13 - Terra Firma
programme.desc: Crichton has arrived on Earth. Even though the Moya crew relaxes on Earth and are treated as VIPs, Crichton can't seem to adjust to life on Earth.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E14 - Twice Shy
programme.desc: Moya takes on a new passenger, Talikaa. However, Talikaa turns out to be an alien in disguise and is intent on harvesting the crew's neural energy.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E15 - Mental As Anything
programme.desc: The males of the crew undergo some training. Crichton learns how to resist Scarran probes. While D'Argo learns some self-control.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E15 - Mental As Anything

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E16 - Bringing Home The Beacon
programme.desc: The women of Moya travel to a dead Leviathan to buy a sensor beacon for Moya which will allow her to appear to be a different ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E16 - Bringing Home The Beacon

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E17 - A Constellation Of Doubt
programme.desc: John Crichton struggles to learn the location of the mysterious Katratzi, whilst watching a television documentary about himself and the aliens.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E17 - A Constellation Of Doubt

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E18 - Prayer
programme.desc: Crichton and Scorpius travel to one of the 'unrealized realities' where Crichton believes he heard Stark say 'Katratzi.'

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E19 - We're So Screwed, Part 1: Fetal Attraction
programme.desc: The crew goes after Aeryn on a Scarran controlled station.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E19 - We're So Screwed, Part 1: Fetal Attraction

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E20 - We're So Screwed, Part 2: Hot To Katratzi
programme.desc: Moya arrives at Katratzi. Crichton attends the peace talks between the Scarrans and the Peacekeepers with a nuclear bomb.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E20 - We're So Screwed, Part 2: Hot To Katratzi

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba
programme.desc: Scorpius has betrayed the crew. Now they're all captured. Their plan failed, the crew has little choice but to help Scorpius's true agenda.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E22 - Bad Timing
programme.desc: With their Crystherium stores low, the Scarrans must travel to Earth through a wormhole as those flowers grow there.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: John Crichton and Aeryn anticipate the birth of their child, only to get caught in the middle of a war that threatens millions of lives.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: Determined not to let his child be born into a world at war, John Crichton puts himself at the center of the conflict.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E1 - Premiere
programme.desc: Astronaut John Crichton attempts to propel his module at high speeds but is hit by a radiation wave and is sucked through a wormhole.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E2 - Exodus From Genesis
programme.desc: A locator beacon, automatically broadcasting its exact location to any Peacekeeper forces in the area.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E2 - Exodus From Genesis

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E3 - Back And Back And Back To The Future
programme.desc: The crew rescues a scientist and his assistant from a disintegrating ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E3 - Back And Back And Back To The Future

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary returns home and her siblings stage a protest against Annie's favoritism.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy and Mary duke it out when Robbie starts dating another girl.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie finds a connection to his girlfriend Joy's missing brother.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon gets caught in the middle of a wild police chase.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary and Lucy realize they need closure from their past breakups.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Ruthie protects a Muslim classmate who is harassed by classmates.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon gets drunk at a party while trying to fit in with the cool crowd.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary, Lucy, and Matt spend their Valentine's Day heartbroken and dateless.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's determined to get married and proposes to a Jewish girl on their first date.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt secretly elopes after one date with a girl from work, Sarah.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie and Eric have a disastrous Jewish dinner with Matt's "future" in-laws.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary returns to Buffalo to start a new career path as a flight attendant.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric snoops to find out if Matt and Sarah are already married.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camdens pay tribute to Ruthie's pen-pal, a marine stationed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric and Rabbi Glass cancel Matt and Sarah's wedding in protest of their union.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Two families of different faiths pull together for Matt and Sarah's wedding.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: It's the last day of the Camdens' summer vacation. Simon is haunted by memories of a fatal car accident.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie leaves town, Peter defends Ruthie, and Simon plans for the future.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: A new neighbor helps several Camdens – and their friends – in distress.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After robbing the bank, the outlaws kidnap Doc Adams and set fire to Dodge City to cover their getaway.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus runs away from Dodge City in shame after being bullied into killing a drunken sharpshooter traveling with a medicine show.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An outlaw's vow to free his brother from jail leads to threats and violence against Marshal Dillon's friends.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Marshal Dillon tracks three robbers from a stagecoach murder holdup while Festus follows Doc on a trip, which leads to near-tragedy.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A bandit holds a preacher, the preacher's fiancée and another woman hostage while Doc Adams treats his wounds.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An Indian girl defies the law of her people by asking white men to intervene when her tribe's leaders sentence her father to die.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc Adams and Festus Haggen decide to catch some fish, but get caught themselves—by a clan of scruffy buffalo hunters.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The love of a rancher’s daughter for a homesteader’s son adds fire to a land feud between their fathers.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus Haggen stirs up a mess of trouble when he takes a job digging up gossip for Dodge City's new newspaper.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt Dillon and Festus become targets for revenge when they try to straighten out two trouble-making sons of an ex-lawman.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A gunman kills a young challenger and becomes a target for revenge—from his own son, as well as the victim's family.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An Indian causes gold fever to break out in Dodge City when he pays for the funeral of a slain friend with a 350 gold piece.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A stranger in Dodge City employs a scare campaign to avenge the death of his preacher brother.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt Dillon, disturbed over being forced to kill a prisoner who was trying to save his life, turns in his badge.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A gang steals a gigantic bar of gold and commandeers the Dodge City blacksmith shop in order to divide the loot.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An embittered ranch woman holds Matt Dillon and Kitty prisoner while plotting Matt's execution to avenge her husband's hanging.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Marshal Dillon is helped by a friendly young runaway who later faces him as a deadly adversary.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A respectable rancher and his son hang an innocent man and let a bewhiskered bounty hunter go on trial for the murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A bunco scheme revolving around a million dollars in sunken treasure sends McGarrett and Five-O on an investigation that stretches halfway around the world and to the Pacific depths off Oahu.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Jack Lord makes his directing debut with this episode about a retired Federal narcotics agent whose son becomes embroiled in a heroin refining operation. McGarrett becomes suspicious of the activities of young Tom Morgan.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The Banzai Pipeline, one of the world's most exciting and dangerous surfing beaches, forms the backdrop for a trio of slayings. McGarrett is thwarted when the man is found murdered near the Pipeline.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett calls on attractive HPD policewomen, senior officers and scientific technology when the Five-O force is confronted by a series of five rape murders.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Anthony Zerbe guest stars as a right-wing extremist who embarks on a murderous crusade against what he considers laxity in law enforcement and too-lenient judges. After the case against hit-man Joseph Furika is dismissed, he is murdered.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Impressionist John Byner makes his dramatic debut as a shipboard comedian beset by gambling debts. McGarrett and Five-O become involved while investigating the robbery-kidnapping of Vincent Gordon on board a cruise ship.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A well-to-do, stylish, Raffles-type jewel thief steals from Waikiki hotel rooms for the thrill of the chase. As his calling card, he leaves a series of clues that add up to an elegant method of operation.
programme.sub-title: 30,000 Rooms and I Have the Key

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Danny and a college professor are kidnapped and held as hostages, to be killed unless two members of a radical group are released from jail. McGarrett, backed by the Governor, refuses to comply with the ransom demands of the kidnappers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A geothermal dynamics genius, plagued by personal financial problems and pressured by a loan shark, plots an extortion scheme that would trigger a man-made volcanic eruption, wiping out the entire city of Hilo.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Postcards from a psychopath taunting McGarrett to remember crime victims of the past precede a series of re-enacted murders. Eddie Josephs puts down the authorities by recreating murders featured in a series of Honolulu magazine articles.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett is on the trail of a suave crook who peddles his stolen goods to legitimate businessmen by socializing with fashion models and buyers. The wily thief has eluded the law by directing and supervising the hijacking of goods.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Notes threatening the life of the state Senate crime committee chairman bring McGarrett into the investigation. Handwriting analysis and a psychiatrist's diagnosis of someone's possible split personality become the prime clues.
programme.sub-title: Bomb, Bomb, Who's Got the Bomb?

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett steps in when powerful Hawaiian cattle baron Col. J.J. Farraday makes his own laws to avenge the beating death of his son. Farraday and his Hawaiian "cowboys" ready a hanging tree when Jay claims his brother was slain by a jealous husband.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A current wave of liquor store robberies and shootings are strangely linked to a fiveyear old bank robbery in which neither the quarter-million-dollar booty nor the thief was ever found.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A gangland-style slaying investigation takes a bizarre turn when an autopsy reveals the victim had two physical identities. Under suspicion for the murder are the victim's wife and his business partner.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Irreplaceable Lautrec and Gauguin art works mysteriously vanish from a millionaire's private collection despite three fail-safe electronic security systems.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Both bearing scars of gangland violence, McGarrett and an elegant dealer in objets d'art, Marni Howard, are sympathetically drawn together.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After experiencing a 'close encounter' of his own, MacGyver begins an investigation of UFO sightings in a small farming community.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver uncovers an illegal trading ring dealing in counterfeit baseball memorabilia.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: An ex-girlfriend frames MacGyver for her broadcasting magnate husband's murder.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights plans for a housing development in an ecologically delicate area.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to Turkey in search of Alexander the Great's tomb and the legendary Eye of Osiris.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver infiltrates a criminal biker gang to help prove a parolee's innocence.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover as a homeless person to investigate the murder of a priest.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Pete Thornton agrees to take on the security of an old friend, political refugee Samantha Lora, but finds he can't do the job alone because of a worsening vision problem. He enlists MacGyver's help.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a mobster's search for stolen loot while nursing his injured leg at a country bed and breakfast run by two elderly sisters.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Murdoc is orderedto kill MacGyver in order to prove his loyalty to a professional hit squad.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a territorial dispute between an Indian reservation and an electric power company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Using their unorthodox methods, the Coltons combine their individual talents to create a team of world-class bounty hunters in this MacGyver spinoff.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton reminisce about past adventures as Pete prepares for eye surgery to treat his Glaucoma.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and the Phoenix Foundation are overseeing the security and protection of Delasora during his trial. MacGyver is obsessed with the death of Murdoc and believes that he's still alive.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's neighbor Kelly Dobbs overhears a plan to have accountant VictorNesbitt murdered. Victor is an accountant with one of Lyle Knox's holding companies and is planning on exposing the company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver picks up his best friend's father to take him to his grandson's Bar Mitzvah and finds himself inadvertently involved in an FBI/CIA mission.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After Prometheus, a crazed arsonist, is responsible for the death of his old friend, MacGyver sets out to solve the mystery of this madman and capture him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver faces the strange and frightening world of Voodoo, as he tries to save his politically active neighbor from a deranged, underground death squad.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A vicious old mountain, woman's back-country family hold Rowdy Yates for ransom when he tries to buy horses from them.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Jed Colby and the wife of a rebel leader are held as hostages in a Mexican border revolution.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Rowdy Yates and his drovers become involved in the local politics of a small town and a militant suffragette reform movement.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Escort to Doom

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A United States marshal arrests drover Jed Colby for an almost forgotten murder.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Clash at Broken Bluff

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Rowdy Yates' chances of getting a big herd across a treacherous river are hampered by an alcoholic guide.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Crossing at White Feather

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: The cattle drive, headed by trail boss Gil Favor and his chief assistant and "ramrod," Rowdy Yates, shares camp with a marshal and his deputy who are taking prisoners in for court trial via a tumbleweed wagon.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A water stop at a mission promises a delightful break in the hard work of driving cattle north until Rowdy Yates and his trail boss, Gil Favor, plus all the hands on the drive are invited to a wedding party.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trails boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates encounter a stage coach accident while driving their cattle north.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor sees his crew of cattle drovers seeking release from the tensions of trail life by indulging in a shatteringly violent day off in a tough little frontier town.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Bitter overtones of the recent War Between the States harass trail boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates as they push their cattle drive north from Texas.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Edge of Madness

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates get a taste of the capricious power of Jed Reston, a cattle and land baron, as they drive their herd north.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Power and the Plow

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates find themselves involved in a brother's crusade for revenge after one of their trail hands suddenly leaves the cattle drive, as they pass through Barker Springs, and subsequently is shot to death.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Four sisters, headed by Hannah Haley are found huddled around their broken-down show wagon as trail boss Gil Favor and his ramrod drive their cattle north to market.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and his ramrod, Rowdy Yates, face the stalking terror of a life-devouring epidemic that strikes their cattle drive while they are on the open plains.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Town in Terror

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and his ramrod Rowdy Yates find themselves, their crew and their cattle drive the target of a vicious gang of bandits who make the plains their stalking ground.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A massive wind-swept plateau, one of the most difficult passes on the trip north, is the scene of the contest between Gil Favor and Jefferson Devereaux - boss of the country through which the drive is passing.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Gil Favor and his ramrod, Rowdy Yates, leave their cattle drive to hunt a half dozen strays and stumble on a woman and her daughter being held prisoner.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.
programme.sub-title: Alex Tastes Death & Finds A Nice Restaurant

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Tess helps Monica see the repercussions of her angry behavior when it affects the lives of some innocent strangers.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a young boy, living with his father in a traveling circus, come to terms with the fact that his father is a little person.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A young girl's life is put in danger after some "harmless" fun on the Internet.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a wealthy man loses everything, the angels show him that there are things in life more valuable than money.
programme.sub-title: The Face On The Bar Room Floor

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A college freshman must choose between his father's vision of what his future should be his own conflicting instincts.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels battle Satan over the fate of an unborn child.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: An ex-filmmaker, who lost his faith in God earlier in life following a tragic accident, must help a young film student rediscover hers.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: With a disastrous tornado heading straight for a small town, Monica is dispatched to help a bitter storm chaser who is intent on fighting nature.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a couple save their marriage when it hits a serious turning point

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: While trying to get through to a troubled young drug addict, Monica tells her the legend of Billie Holiday and her powerful song about lynchings in the South.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is called for jury duty and must vote whether or not a man should get the death penalty.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a young victim of Tourettes syndrome reconcile with his estranged father who is in prison.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a teenage father see past the gang culture he's always known and look toward the future.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a tragedy strikes their family, a young girl challenges her father's trust in science and tries to prove that God really does exist.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels try to bring together an orphan with a bad heart and a lonely woman before time runs out.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must help a businessman whose career is threatened realize what matters most in life.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help an alcoholic, womanizing actor (who plays an angel on television) and the young boy who idolizes him realize the true purpose of God's messengers.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a seemingly perfect family when a teenager learns a damaging secret about his father.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a wealthy teenager learn about humility when his family loses its money.

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 2)
programme.desc: During his fishing trip, Matlock encounters the small, unfriendly town of Lone Pine as he attempts to solve the mysterious death of a young farmhand and uncover a town-wide coverup.

programme.title: Matlock: The Abduction
programme.desc: While attending a UCLA Law seminar, Matlock and Michelle end up in a dangerous dilemma. After giving Matlock inside information regarding an upcoming hit his former law school classmate is involved in a fatal hit and run.

programme.title: Matlock: Mr. Awesome
programme.desc: Matlock defends Anne Johnson, a single mother who’s been accused of murdering her recently estranged boyfriend.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 1)
programme.desc: A phony story is planted on the nightly news when a corrupt land developer pays off the on-air talent but when the producer fakes his own death, the anchorwoman unwittingly helps him along, never realizing it’s somebody else she killed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hired to defend an innocent newscaster, Matlock is baffled until evidence turns up that puts him on the trail of the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s daughter’s surprise visit home is interrupted when a judge, on a Blue Ribbon panel investigating the assassination of the town Mayor, is accused of sexual assault and seeks Matlock’s counsel.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 2)
programme.desc: When his daughter is jailed for contempt Matlock takes over her case. Now it is up to him to uncover the truth behind a sinister cover-up that involves high government officials, including the Chief of Police, in a child pornography ring and a murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock and his daughter Leanne arrive at a seaside resort to plan their new law partnership, they discover the manager has been murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 2)
programme.desc: While vacationing with his daughter, Matlock tries to solve the murder of the hotel manager at their seaside resort.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ghost
programme.desc: A friend of Matlock’s, Mike Wilson, has been murdered and his wife has been accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Singer
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Juror
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 1)
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 2)
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock: The Debt
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock: The Revenge
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Matlock: The Obsession
programme.desc: Matlock is disturbed by frightening dreams that apparently give him clues to the murder of a doctor at a clinic patronized by celebrities. He even begins to wonder if he’s psychic.

programme.title: Matlock: The Divorce
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.
